name: /plugin-install accepts a plugin whose signature verifies against the configured signing keys when require_signed_plugins is true
command:
mkdir -p stub-clones/acme/signed && printf 'name: signed
rules:
  - id: foo
    detector: rubric/detectors/foo.sh
' > stub-clones/acme/signed/plugin.yaml && printf 'good-signature
' > stub-clones/acme/signed/plugin.yaml.sig && printf 'require_signed_plugins: true
signing_keys: [k1]
' > userConfig.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/plugin-install.sh" acme/signed --gh-clone-stub stub-clones --rule-tester-stub pass --user-config userConfig.yaml --signature-stub valid 2>out.txt && grep -q 'signature_verified=true' out.txt && grep -q 'plugin_installed=signed' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
